runs.note: I have updated the middleware.js file to re-enable the Content Security Policy (CSP) in report-only mode. The CSP configuration allows scripts from the CDN domain (cdn.mediapub.com), restricts the base URI to 'self', and prevents framing by other sites. The applyCSP function generates a unique nonce per request and includes it in the CSP header, allowing the inline analytics script to execute while still protecting against XSS attacks. This change aligns with the CSP re-enablement plan described in the provided documents.
